params.name: Pumpkin Coach
params.description: On Aug 28, AD 651, Cinderella took this carriage and attended the ball. Cinderella was invited to the prince's ball, but was hindered by her stepmother and two step-sisters. The fairy godmother cast magic on Cinderella so that no one could recognize her, and turned a pumpkin into a carriage as her transportation to the ball. This gave the helpless Cinderella a chance to attend the ball. On the next day, the dumb prince finally found her through the glass slipper. Since then, they have lived happ …
